title: Music Theory: Essentials of Music Theory for Modern Music
description:
Led by Future Skills, this course will equip you with the core tools of modern music theory and show you exactly how to use them in today’s music landscape. By the end of this course, you will be able to read and write musical notation, build and analyze scales and keys, construct common and advanced chords, and create compelling chord progressions inside Ableton Live.

Music Theory: Learn the Essentials of Music Theory for Modern Music is designed as the foundational part of a three-course journey, focusing on the building blocks of music—from notes and piano layout to harmony and advanced chord structures. What makes this course unique is its practical, producer-friendly approach: you won’t just learn theory, you’ll actively apply it in a digital music production environment.

This course is ideal for beginner musicians, producers, songwriters, and performers who want to strengthen their musical foundation. No prior music theory experience is required, but to be successful, you should be comfortable using a computer and have basic familiarity with music creation tools. Whether you’re starting out or filling knowledge gaps, this course will help you turn musical ideas into confident, informed compositions.
